errors.description: Runtime deployment health evidence was signed and verified with the configured Ed25519 authority.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Only signed and verified runtime health evidence may be treated as attested.

errors.description: Runtime attestation signing material or signature evidence is missing.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Missing runtime attestation cannot prove deployment/runtime health integrity.

errors.description: Runtime attestation signature, signer binding, or diagnostic safety validation failed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Invalid runtime attestation cannot establish cryptographic runtime trust.

errors.description: Runtime attestation policy hash does not match the expected policy hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Policy drift between attested runtime and expected governance policy must block trust.

errors.description: Runtime attestation is explicitly blocked because required evidence is missing or unsafe.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Blocked runtime attestation must not be promoted to verified deployment trust.
